MEDKIT.Title: Coven's Automation Toolkit Configuration: {name}
MEDKIT.NoPermission: You do not have permission to modify this tab.

MassApply.Label: Mass Apply / Update
MassApply.Tooltip: Apply / update automations for every item under this document.
MassApply.ConfirmPrompt: Apply registered automations to every item under this document? This rewrites their data and cannot be undone.
MassApply.CompendiumPending: Compendium mass apply isn't wired yet - waiting on a pack-aware updater.
MassApply.CycleWarning: Circular dependency detected among items. Some updates may occur out of sequence!

Identifier.Label: Document Identifier
Identifier.Hint: Item & Activity identifiers must be modified on the respective document sheet.
Identifier.OverrideHint: Overrides the identifier used to match this document to an automation. Defaults to the slugified name.

Source.Label: Automation Source
Source.Hint: Pick which module provides the automation for this document.
Source.HintNone: No automation sources have registered an automation for this document.

Version.Label: Automation Version
Version.Hint: Reported by the selected automation source.

IgnoreItem.Label: Ignore Item
IgnoreItem.Hint: Skip this item during mass apply / update operations.

Embedded.Empty: No embedded macros on this document.

EmbeddedMacros.Title: Embedded Macros: {name}
EmbeddedMacros.Invalid: Macro "{name}" needs a name, event, and pass before saving.
EmbeddedMacros.Duplicate: A macro named "{name}" already exists on this document.

Fields.Name: Name
Fields.ConfigDisabled: Skip If Target Is Config Key

DocProps.Hint: Document properties feed the dnd5e patches ({list}).
DocProps.Title: {type}: {name}

Ability.Hint: Extra abilities this attack may use.
Ability.Label: Alternate Abilities

DamageFormula.Hint: Roll formula offered as an alternative; the highest-rolling option is used.
DamageFormula.Label: Alternate Formulas

RollModifier.Hint: Comma-separated dice modifiers (e.g. x, min1, kh1).
RollModifier.Invalid: At least one modifier is required.
RollModifier.Label: Roll Modifiers

otherAbilities.Hint: Extra abilities this attack may use.
otherAbilities.Label: Other Abilities

Restrictions.Hint: Leave a restriction empty to skip it. Comma-separate free-form values.

Ability.Label: Abilities
Ability.Hint: Match spells that use any selected ability.
Ability.InvertedHint: Exclude spells that use selected abilities.

DamagePart.Label: Damage Part
DamagePart.Hint: Target selected damage parts on matched items. "Base" is default if this is empty.

Identifier.Label: Target Identifiers
Identifier.Hint: A comma separated list. Match one or more particular items by identifier: item|activity|partIndex.

Property.Label: Properties
Property.Hint: Match any or all selected item properties.
Property.InvertedHint: Exclude any or all selected item properties.

Unavailable.Heading: No automation registered
Unavailable.Copy: No source provides automation for this item.

Footer.SaveTooltip: Commit pending changes; keep the window open.
Footer.DiscardPrompt: You have unsaved changes. Discard them and close?

RulesToggle.NotApplicable: Rules selection not applicable for this document.

Configuration.None: No configurable options for this automation.

ClassBonus.Label: Class Spellcasting Bonuses
ClassBonus.Hint: Flat spell save DC and attack bonuses granted per class while this item is equipped (e.g. Bloodwell Vial).
ClassBonus.Duplicate: A bonus for class "{identifier}" already exists.

behavior.Label: Behavior
behavior.Tooltip: How the automation triggers and what it applies.

tuning.Label: Tuning
tuning.Tooltip: Numeric and selection tuning for the automation.

visuals.Label: Visuals
visuals.Tooltip: Icons, images, and other visual hooks.

Documents.Placeholder: Paste UUID or drag a document here
Documents.InvalidUuid: No document found for that UUID.

MagicalDarkness.Label: Magical Darkness
MagicalDarkness.Hint: Tokens inside this region are blocked from non-magical light sources.

Obscured.Label: Obscured
Obscured.Hint: Tokens inside this region are heavily obscured.

Name.Label: Match Name
Name.Hint: Override the name used when matching this actor (typically NPCs) against registered automations.

IgnoreActor.Label: Ignore Actor
IgnoreActor.Hint: Skip this actor during mass compendium / scene updates.

ConditionResistance.Label: Condition Resistance
ConditionResistance.Hint: Conditions this actor has resistance to. Click All for any save, or pick specific abilities to scope it.

ConditionVulnerability.Label: Condition Vulnerability
ConditionVulnerability.Hint: Conditions this actor has vulnerability to. Click All for any save, or pick specific abilities to scope it.

Hidden.Label: Hidden Activity
Hidden.Hint: Hide this activity from the activity-use selection dialog.

PlacedRegion.Hint: Configuration applied to any region this activity creates.

Effects.Label: Region Effects
Effects.Hint: Effects from this item applied to tokens inside a region this activity creates.
Effects.None: This item has no effects to apply.

RegionMacros.Label: Region Registered Macros
RegionMacros.Hint: Registered macros copied onto a region this activity creates.

Activities.Label: Region Activities
Activities.Hint: Activities from this item that fire when tokens interact with a region this activity creates.
Activities.NoneAvailable: This item has no other activities to trigger.

Conditions.Label: Conditions
Conditions.Hint: Conditions applied to the actor while this effect is active.

SpecialDuration.Label: Special Durations
SpecialDuration.Hint: Triggers that automatically remove this effect.

NoAnimation.Label: Disable Animation
NoAnimation.Hint: Suppress effect apply/remove animations for this effect.

Picker.Label: Registered Macros
Picker.Hint: Select which registered macros run on this document. Each picked macro fires for every event it declares.

Macros.None: No macros are registered in the global registry.

Manual.Title: Roll!
Manual.SaveContext: {source} targets you with a {type}, roll to save!
Manual.RerollDepth: Maximum reroll/explode depth reached — resolve modified rolls manually before entering a total.

Automation.Name: Automation Sources
Automation.Label: Configure Automation Sources
Automation.Hint: Enable automation sources, set their priority, and pick extra compendiums to use.

ManualRolls.Name: Manual Rolls
ManualRolls.Label: Configure Manual Rolls
ManualRolls.Hint: Settings for CAT's roll resolver designed for manually rolling dice.

ManualRollsEnabled.Name: Manual Rolls
ManualRollsEnabled.Hint: Enable the Roll Resolver for unfulfilled rolls.

ManualRollsUsers.Name: Manual Rolls Enabled For
ManualRollsUsers.Hint: Configure which users use Manual Rolls.

ManualRollsInclusion.Name: Manual Rolls Inclusion
ManualRollsInclusion.Hint: What actor's rolls should be prompted for.

ManualRollsPromptOnMiss.Name: Prompt on Miss
ManualRollsPromptOnMiss.Hint: Prompt for damage rolls even for missed attacks.

ManualRollsPromptNoData.Name: Prompt on No Data
ManualRollsPromptNoData.Hint: Prompt for rolls with no data, likely used in macros.

ManualRollsEntryMode.Name: Manual Rolls Input
ManualRollsEntryMode.Hint: How dice results are entered when fulfilling rolls manually.

ManualRollsGMFulfill.Name: Gamemaster Fulfils Rolls
ManualRollsGMFulfill.Hint: When enabled the Gamemaster fulfils all rolls.

ManualRollsRichContext.Name: Manual Rolls Rich Context
ManualRollsRichContext.Hint: Show full roll context (targets, save DCs, damage phrasing) in the prompt instead of a plain heading.

AutomationSources.Name: Automation Sources
AutomationSources.Hint: Sources and compendiums used for automation. Drag to set priority, the lowest number takes priority.

Backups.Name: Backups
Backups.Label: Configure Backups
Backups.Hint: Settings for automatically creating actor backups.

Compendiums.Name: Compendiums
Compendiums.Label: Configure Compendiums
Compendiums.Hint: Configure compendiums from which automations will retrieve documents.

MonsterCompendiums.Name: Monsters
MonsterCompendiums.Hint: Compendiums searched when an automation requests a monster. Drag to set priority, the lowest number takes priority.

ItemCompendiums.Name: Items
ItemCompendiums.Hint: Compendiums searched when an automation requests an item. Drag to set priority, the lowest number takes priority.

SpellCompendiums.Name: Spells
SpellCompendiums.Hint: Compendiums searched when an automation requests a spell. Drag to set priority, the lowest number takes priority.

MacroCompendiums.Name: Macros
MacroCompendiums.Hint: Overwrites registered macros with the macros from the selected compendiums. Every macro in these compendiums is executed on load. Drag to set priority, the lowest number takes priority.

DisplayDebugLogs.Name: Display Debug Logs
DisplayDebugLogs.Hint: When enabled, the console will show debug logs.

DisplayDebugEventData.Name: Display Event Data
DisplayDebugEventData.Hint: When enabled, the console will show sample event data for every event.

Help.Name: Help
Help.Label: Help
Help.Hint: Help with required module settings and troubleshooting CAT automations.

HideNames.Name: Hide Token Names
HideNames.Hint: When enabled, various dialogs will not show enemy token names.

DiceSoNice.Name: Dice So Nice Compatibility
DiceSoNice.Hint: When enabled, Dice So Nice damage roll animations will be delayed until after all damage roll macros are complete.

EffectDescriptions.Name: Automatic Effect Descriptions
EffectDescriptions.Hint: When enabled, effects without descriptions will automatically be filled in from the origin item.

EffectDescriptionsNPC.Name: Hide NPC Effect Descriptions
EffectDescriptionsNPC.Hint: When enabled, the Automatic Effect Description setting will not apply for NPC created effects.

Permissions.Name: Permissions
Permissions.Label: Configure Permissions
Permissions.Hint: Settings for user permissions for CAT automation and configuration menus.

PermissionsAutomation.Name: Automation Tab
PermissionsAutomation.Hint: Minimum user role allowed to modify the Automation tab.

PermissionsConfiguration.Name: Configuration Tab
PermissionsConfiguration.Hint: Minimum user role allowed to modify the Configuration tab.

PermissionsGeneric.Name: Generic Tab
PermissionsGeneric.Hint: Minimum user role allowed to modify the Generic tab.

PermissionsEmbedded.Name: Embedded Macros Tab
PermissionsEmbedded.Hint: Minimum user role allowed to modify the Embedded Macros tab.

PermissionsDocProps.Name: Document Properties Tab
PermissionsDocProps.Hint: Minimum user role allowed to modify the Document Properties tab.

PermissionsMacros.Name: Registered Macros Tab
PermissionsMacros.Hint: Minimum user role allowed to modify the Registered Macros tab.

PermissionsPlacedRegion.Name: Placed Region Tab
PermissionsPlacedRegion.Hint: Minimum user role allowed to modify the Placed Region tab.

Summons.Name: Summons
Summons.Label: Configure Summons
Summons.Hint: Settings for summons use and management.

CV.Name: {condition} Condition Vulnerability
CV.Description: Condition Vulnerability to {condition}, roll at disadvantage to save. 1/true for all saves, or a comma-separated list of abilities (e.g. str,dex).

CR.Name: {condition} Condition Resistance
CR.Description: Condition Resistance to {condition}, roll at advantage to save. 1/true for all saves, or a comma-separated list of abilities (e.g. str,dex).

Unknown.Tooltip: Unable to match to any condition search keys
